title: Error Message Analysis
scenario: Write a prompt that can be used to generate a JavaScript function that analyzes an error message and returns a dictionary containing information about the error. The function should be able to identify the type of error and provide a suggestion for resolving it. The output should be in the format of a JavaScript function.
constraints: The function should be able to handle multiple types of errors
The output should be under 100 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the function correctly analyzes the error message and returns relevant information
Check if the code is well-structured and follows best practices
Check if the function can handle multiple types of errors and is under 100 lines of code
